name: Marinated Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup sweet red onion, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 10-12 quarts of salted water to a rolling boil in a large stockpot.
2. Add the rotelle noodles and cook for 8-10 minutes, until tender.
3. Drain the noodles, rinse briefly, and drain well.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the cooked pasta, marinated artichoke hearts, sliced black olives, diced pimiento, chopped onion, shredded provolone cheese, and shredded cheddar cheese.
5. In a blender, mix together 1/3 cup white wine vinegar, 1/4 cup olive oil, 2 tablespoons honey, dried basil, dill, garlic powder, pepper, and salt until well combined.
6. Pour the blended mixture over the pasta and cheese mixture, stirring to ensure everything is evenly coated.
7. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 2-48 hours before serving slightly chilled.
